hypothesis: If we add CBM-learned, orthogonal, property-specific steering vectors to a frozen LLM’s intermediate activations during molecular generation, then the model will achieve lower MAE/Best100MAE on specified single- and multi-property targets and generalize to out-of-distribution combinations while preserving validity, novelty, and synthesizability relative to vanilla, ActAdd, and fine-tuning baselines because disentangled concept directions enable precise latent control without retraining the LLM.
